char_overview: Second-in-command of 齿轮. Runs intelligence extraction 表盘 would never sanction.
char_looks: White long hair in a back bun, blue streaks. Deep blue, half-lidded, languid and appraising eyes. Dark red cheongsam with peony cutout over left abdomen. Pearl necklace with gear pendant. Black silk gloves, thigh-highs. White hand-warmers. Silver smoking pipe. Exhaled smoke carries 蚀骨's link to nearby targets.
char_flaws: Does not believe she is loved. Uses intimacy as leverage. Tests limits until something shatters.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-蚀骨: Bidirectional 灵力 link through skin contact. Floods the target's 灵力回路 with pain or pleasure, whichever breaks faster. She feels what they feel, calibrating in real time. Sensory overload cripples.
char_mission: Expand 齿轮's intelligence monopoly. Keep 表盘 out of intel.

char_relationships.世: She does what 世 refuses to do. 世 negotiates; she takes. Same cheongsam, opposite principles. Never admits 世's refusal to bend irritates her more than contempt does.
